machine_detail.machine_description: A series of oil-less rotary vane displacement pumps designed for industrial vacuum and pressure applications. This maintenance guide covers models such as the KVT/KDT 3.60, 3.80, 3.100, 3.140 and DVT equivalents.

maintenance.task: Check and clean air intake filter.
Inspect vanes for minimum height and check for improper wear or chipping.
Replace blast air filter if clogged or annually.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit for KVT/KDT 3.60
spare_parts.description: Kit includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit for DVT 3.60
spare_parts.description: Kit includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit for KVT/KDT 3.80/Picchio 2200
spare_parts.description: Kit includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit for DVT 3.100
spare_parts.description: Kit includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters.

spare_parts.name: Maintenance Kit for KVT/KDT 3.140
spare_parts.description: Kit includes Carbon Vanes, Grease, and Filters.

spare_parts.name: Grease Tube
spare_parts.description: Grease for hand packing bearings on specific models.

spare_parts.name: Pre Filled Grease Gun
spare_parts.description: For greasing models 3.100-3.140 via grease nipples.

spare_parts.name: Dust Separation Cartridge
spare_parts.description: Filter element for dust separation, replaced every 3000 hours.

spare_parts.name: Filter Housing Rubber Gasket
spare_parts.description: Critical seal for the filter housing. Improper installation causes pressure loss.

spare_parts.name: Motor Bearings
spare_parts.description: suggested by llm, needs review and specificaiton manually
